'''''Star Wars Tales'' 6''' is the sixth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Tales]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[December 20]], [[2000]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Where can you find an encounter between Yoda and a probe droid on Dagobah, the chance meeting of C-3PO and Darth Vader on Cloud City, and a cannonball by Boba Fett into the Sarlacc on Tatooine? In the many pages of ''Star Wars Tales'' #6, the ultimate quarterly romp through a galaxy far, far away ! This stellar issue features a Yoda story by Sean Konot and Scott Morse, a haunting tale of Darth Vader and C-3PO by Ryder Windham and Kilian Plunkett, a gritty yarn showcasing Greedo by Jim Pascoe, Tom Fassbender, and Eric Powell, plus many others!''

==Contents==
{{Quote|We view ''Star Wars Tales'' as a creator showcase where none of the stories necessarily fall into official ''Star Wars'' canon.|Allan Kausch|<ref name="Tales 6">''Star Wars Tales'' 6</ref>}}
''Star Wars Tales'' editor [[David Land|Dave Land]] and [[Lucas Licensing]] continuity editor [[Allan Kausch]] pursue [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] in an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walker]] while Kausch explains to Land the non-[[canon]] nature of the series. Land jumps free of the [[Walker/Legends|walker]], while Kausch is caught in an Ewok log trap, leading [[Gender/Legends|him]] to express his hope that these events are not canon, as he and the AT-ST are destroyed.<ref name="Tales 6" />

*"[[The Hovel on Terk Street]]"
*"[[A Hot Time in the Cold Town Tonite!]]"
*"[[Fortune, Fate, and the Natural History of the Sarlacc]]"
*"[[Junkheap Hero]]"
*"[[The Hidden]]"
*"[[Thank the Maker]]"
